Interface ProgramModelElement

All Superinterfaces:
AccessFlags, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AnnotationProperty, ClassType, ClassTypeContainer, Constructor, EnumConstant, Field, Member, Method, Type, TypeParameter, Variable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnnotationDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyInfo, ArrayType, Bigint, ByteCodeElement, ClassDeclaration, ClassFile, ConstructorDeclaration, ConstructorInfo, DefaultConstructor, EnumClassDeclaration, EnumConstantSpecification, EnumDeclaration, FieldInfo, FieldSpecification, ImplicitEnumMethod, ImplicitEnumValueOf, ImplicitEnumValues, InterfaceDeclaration, IntersectionType, MemberInfo, MethodDeclaration, MethodInfo, NullType, Package, ParameterizedType, PrimitiveType, Real, TypeDeclaration, TypeParameterDeclaration, TypeParameterInfo, VariableSpecification
public interface ProgramModelElement extends NamedModelElement, AccessFlags
An entity of the program meta model.

  • Field Details

    • LEXICAL_ORDER

      static final Order LEXICAL_ORDER
      Lexical order objects comparing full names. For partial names, use the corresponding order of NamedModelElement.

  • Method Details

    • getFullName

      String getFullName()
      Returns the maximal expanded name including all applicable qualifiers.
      Returns:
      the full name of this program model element.

    • getProgramModelInfo

      ProgramModelInfo getProgramModelInfo()
      Returns the instance that can retrieve information about this program model element.
      Returns:
      the program model info of this element.

    • setProgramModelInfo

      void setProgramModelInfo(ProgramModelInfo pmi)
      Sets the instance that can retrieve information about this program model element. Should not be called from outside a service.
      Parameters:
      pmi - the program model info to be used for this element.
